current_tasks: Latest remote-pushed/CI-green baseline remains 4e02e548 `refactor(homestead): scope surface context providers` unless pushed later. Local branch now should be ahead of origin/develop by 21 after this handoff commit, not yet pushed.

New commits after prior handoff: f2877ebc `refactor(app-dev): extract surface diagnostics runtime`; 767bbbc4 `refactor(app-dev): mount surface inspector as custom element`; 35c5f002 `refactor(app-dev): extract dashboard runtime`; 051e2389 `docs(ui): define promotion path`.

f2877ebc extracted `/surfaces` boot logic from `apps/dev/src/pages/surfaces.astro` into `apps/dev/src/lib/surface-diagnostics-runtime.ts`, with `surface-diagnostics-runtime.test.ts`. It uses dependency injection for boot runtime/setup shell/manifest registration/ledger mounting and lazy-imports shell setup to avoid test import-resolution issues. `apps/dev/tsconfig.json` gained `@refarm.dev/locales/*` path mapping so type-check can follow Homestead source imports.

767bbbc4 added a custom-element boundary for `apps/dev/src/lib/surface-inspector.ts`: `STUDIO_SURFACE_INSPECTOR_ELEMENT_NAME`, `defineStudioSurfaceInspectorElement(...)`, `mountReactiveStudioSurfaceInspectorElement(...)`, `StudioSurfaceInspectorMountOptions`, and `StudioSurfaceInspectorElement`. `apps/dev/src/pages/index.astro` creates `<refarm-surface-inspector>` in the statusbar and mounts it via the element helper.

35c5f002 extracted the large inline dashboard boot script from `apps/dev/src/pages/index.astro` into `apps/dev/src/lib/studio-dashboard-runtime.ts`, with `studio-dashboard-runtime.test.ts`. The new runtime owns mode resolution, Homestead runtime boot, first-party plugin handle registration, stream demo setup, statusbar controls, inspector island mounting, safe boot failure UI, and dependency injection for tests. `index.astro` is now a small Astro shell that calls `bootStudioDashboardWorkbench({ baseUrl: import.meta.env.BASE_URL })` and delegates failure UI to `renderStudioDashboardBootFailure`.

051e2389 documented the promotion path in `docs/UI_ARCHITECTURE.md`: apps/dev is proving ground only; semantic runtime mechanics go to Homestead package, repeated visual primitives/tokens/classes go to DS package, and host behavior/copy/demo data stays in apps. User explicitly reminded to cultivate UI primitives in DS when patterns recur; this was recorded as architecture guidance.

Validation passed for the latest dashboard/runtime work: `npm --prefix apps/dev test -- studio-dashboard-runtime.test.ts stream-demo.test.ts surface-inspector.test.ts`; `npm --prefix apps/dev run type-check`; `npm --prefix apps/dev run build`; `npm run project:validate --silent`; `git diff --check`.
